s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws and separate the washer nozzle sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the windshield.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the washer nozzle sub-assembly from the washer hose.
Select a washer nozzle sub-assembly so that the washer fluid spray area is within the standard.
Connect the selected washer nozzle sub-assembly to the washer hose.
Engage the 2 claws and install the washer nozzle sub-assembly.
